events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: rebar placement inspected, wrong bar size vs schedule (deformation count/size - ID+DOC). This is non-compliant/installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high/critical? Wrong bar size in structural rebar can be critical. I'll say critical. Work stage tested/inspected. Percent complete maybe 90. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings/actions/rationale/references.
